feature_title: Plan - OpenRouter AI Recommendation Long-Term Review

companion_files.name: HANDOFF.md
companion_files.content:
# Handoff - OpenRouter AI Recommendation Long-Term Review
## Feature
- OpenRouter AI recommendation long-term review (`PLAN.md`)

## Current State
- Extracted from fjordnode umbrella remaining scope (`Bundle D`, former Phase 4).
- Planning only; no implementation started.
- Phase 0 completed on 2026-02-15 via live contract re-audit and explicit regression matrix definition.

## 2026-02-15 Contract Audit Highlights
1. Discover generation does not currently use OpenAI service; it is Last.fm/Lidarr/queue driven.
2. `backend/src/services/openai.ts` is currently present but not actively wired to runtime recommendation routes.
3. No OpenRouter surfaces exist yet (service, endpoints, or settings fields).
4. No artist AI chat route exists yet (`/api/artists/ai-chat/:artistId` pending).
5. Settings UI currently exposes artwork-oriented controls (Fanart/Last.fm), with OpenAI references in hooks/types/API.
6. Product direction updated: do not expose user-facing chat UI for similar-artist recommendations; implement one-click results flow instead.

## Anti-Staleness Guardrails
1. Re-read plan + handoff + prompt history before proposing code changes.
2. Re-validate settings/route assumptions against current code at each phase boundary.
3. Record regression-impact test IDs before coding each atomic task.
4. Capture backend-direct + frontend-proxy probe evidence for externally reachable changes.
5. Update stale plan links immediately when files move.

## Next Actions
1. Start Phase 1 (`Task 1.1`) provider abstraction contract + adapters.
2. Implement OpenRouter runtime (`Task 1.2`) with normalized timeout/error mapping.
3. Perform settings bridge work (`Task 1.3`) before artist-route/frontend integration.
4. Use `OR-*` regression IDs from plan as non-optional gate in Phase 4.
5. Implement artist AI as `/artists/ai-similar` + non-chat UI only; keep chat route out of scope unless product direction changes.

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan - OpenRouter AI Recommendation Long-Term Review

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-15
- Feature: Bundle D extraction from fjordnode umbrella (`AI recommendation stack`)
- Parent context: `.agents/plans/archived/fjordnode-feature-port-umbrella/PLAN.md` (Phase 4 extraction)
- Scope: Planning/design only (no implementation in this document)
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation state: Backlog candidate (not started)

## Why This Was Split Out

The former umbrella contained multiple independent workstreams. Bundle D has cross-cutting API/settings/UI impact and is safer to execute as a standalone track with explicit regression controls.

## Goal

Deliver provider-safe AI recommendation surfaces (OpenRouter + existing fallback paths) without breaking current OpenAI/local behavior or frontend contract stability.

## Staleness and Rework Prevention Protocol (Mandatory)

1. Run a re-context checkpoint at session start and before each atomic task:
- read this plan, `HANDOFF.md`, and `PROMPT_HISTORY.md` in full,
- check `git status` and latest touched files for impacted surfaces.
2. Maintain a living dependency check at each phase boundary:
- verify current settings schema/API fields and route contracts still match planned assumptions,
- update this plan immediately if assumptions drift.
3. Maintain regression-first execution:
- add targeted error-path contract tests for each new/changed endpoint,
- record backend-direct and frontend-proxied probe evidence for externally reachable paths.
4. Prevent stale references:
- run plan-link checks at session start and before handoff,
- update inbound references when files are moved/archived.
5. Prevent quiet rework:
- before coding, record whether each touched surface is `Reuse`, `Adapt`, or `New`,
- after each task, record what was actually changed and why prior behavior remains safe.

## Full-Stack Request Path Baseline

1. Client URL/base path:
- Settings and recommendation UIs via frontend `/api/*` proxies.
2. Frontend proxy behavior:
- all calls must route through `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
3. Backend path candidates:
- `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`
4. Service/config candidates:
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts`
- `backend/src/services/openrouter.ts` (planned)
- `backend/src/config.ts`
5. Downstream dependencies:
- OpenAI/OpenRouter external APIs
- PostgreSQL (`SystemSettings`)
6. Deployment modes to validate:
- `docker-compose.aio.yml`
- `docker-compose.yml`
- local host-run (`docker-compose.local.yml` + host frontend/backend)

## 2026-02-15 Reality Check (De-Stale Snapshot)

1. Current AI/provider state:
- OpenAI settings fields exist in DB/API/UI (`openaiEnabled`, `openaiApiKey`, `openaiModel`, `openaiBaseUrl`).
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts` exists but currently has no call sites; it is not driving active recommendation routes.
- No OpenRouter service/routes/settings surfaces exist yet.
2. Current recommendation/discovery behavior:
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts` is Last.fm/DB/fuzzy-match based (no LLM path).
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts` generation flow is queue + Last.fm/Lidarr pipeline (no OpenAI/OpenRouter dependency).
- There is no `/api/artists/ai-chat/:artistId` endpoint at present.
3. Current frontend state:
- Settings currently expose Artwork services (`AIServicesSection`) for Fanart/Last.fm only.
- System settings hooks/types/API client still reference OpenAI test/settings paths.
- Artist page integration point is `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx` and `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`.
4. Scope impact from this snapshot:
- The migration is additive/new-feature work, not a direct replacement of currently-used OpenAI runtime logic in discover/recommendations.
- Contract risk is highest in settings schema/API compatibility and new artist-chat route behavior.
5. Product direction update (2026-02-15):
- No user-facing conversational chat UI should be introduced for this feature.
- AI similar-artist UX must be one-click retrieval (button -> results list/panel), not chat input/history.

## Spec Outline

1. Add provider abstraction for recommendation/chat workloads.
2. Add OpenRouter service adapter with strict parsing, timeouts, and retries.
3. Extend settings APIs for provider status/model/test controls.
4. Add guarded AI route surfaces (artist chat + AI weekly + discover parity).
5. Wire frontend controls/surfaces through centralized API client.
6. Add fallback/regression coverage and full-stack probes.

## Refined Spec

### Constraints

1. Preserve current route payload shapes for existing consumers.
2. Do not remove existing fallback behavior while introducing new provider.
3. Keep provider selection operator-visible and reversible.
4. Any new settings fields must be backward compatible.
5. Treat provider failures as expected runtime conditions (not exceptional-only paths).
6. No user-facing chat interaction for similar-artist recommendations.

### Acceptance Criteria

1. Provider status/model/test surfaces are operational.
2. One-click similar-artist AI retrieval works with deterministic fallback behavior.
3. Route contracts remain stable under timeout/error conditions.
4. Backend-direct and frontend-base probes succeed for all shipped endpoints.
5. No chat input/history bubble UI is exposed to users for this feature.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Status Legend

- `Pending`: Not started
- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished and includes completion summary

## Phase 0: Re-Context and Contract Freeze

### Task 0.1: Freeze current contracts and fallback semantics
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: baseline route/status/settings contract notes and fallback expectations.
- Completion summary:
  - Re-context complete against live code paths in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`, `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`, `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`, `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`, `backend/src/services/openai.ts`, `frontend/lib/api.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/types.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`, `frontend/app/settings/page.tsx`, and `frontend/features/settings/components/sections/AIServicesSection.tsx`.
  - Confirmed no active AI route for artist chat and no OpenRouter surfaces yet.
  - Confirmed discover generation path is not currently OpenAI-dependent.
  - Verification: static route/client contract inspection only (no runtime command execution required for this freeze step).

### Task 0.2: Define test matrix and failure injections
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: explicit test IDs for timeout, malformed payload, provider-down, and fallback correctness.
- Completion summary:
  - Defined initial regression matrix IDs (to be implemented in Phase 4):
    - `OR-A1`: settings provider status endpoint returns configured/unconfigured contract-safe payload.
    - `OR-A2`: provider test endpoint success path with valid model.
    - `OR-A3`: provider test endpoint timeout/downstream failure maps to stable `{ error }` response.
    - `OR-B1`: artist AI chat returns schema-valid recommendations with model echo.
    - `OR-B2`: artist AI chat malformed provider payload returns deterministic fallback/error envelope.
    - `OR-B3`: artist AI chat provider down/429 path degrades without crashing route.
    - `OR-C1`: discover/weekly parity path remains unchanged when AI provider is disabled.
    - `OR-C2`: provider-enabled path does not regress existing non-AI recommendation routes.
    - `OR-FS1`: frontend `/api/*` proxy calls for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
    - `OR-FS2`: backend-direct endpoint probes for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
  - Verification: matrix documented and mapped to planned phases; implementation pending.

## Reuse/Consolidation Check (2026-02-15)

- Reused patterns:
  - Backend system settings route/test pattern in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`.
  - Frontend API boundary in `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
  - Frontend settings state pattern in `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`.
  - Artist page action-bar insertion pattern in `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx`.
- Duplication intentionally kept:
  - Existing OpenAI settings fields remain during planning; rename/cutover deferred to dedicated migration step to avoid breaking current settings reads.
- Consolidation deferred:
  - Provider abstraction shared across any future LLM consumers (discover/other assistants) will be designed in Phase 1 before adding multiple ad-hoc clients.

## Phase 1: Backend Provider Foundation

### Task 1.1: Provider abstraction contract and adapters
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider interface + OpenAI/OpenRouter adapter wiring.

### Task 1.2: OpenRouter service implementation
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: strict parser, bounded retries/timeouts, normalized error mapping.

### Task 1.3: Settings API surface extension
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider status/model/test endpoints and persisted controls.

## Proposed Execution Slices (Post-Phase-0)

1. Slice S1: Provider Contract Scaffold
- Add provider interface + OpenAI adapter wrap + OpenRouter adapter skeleton in backend service layer.
- No route behavior change yet; compile-only safety.
2. Slice S2: OpenRouter Runtime + Error Normalization
- Implement OpenRouter chat/models/status helpers with strict parsing, timeout, retry bounds, and normalized errors.
3. Slice S3: Settings Schema/API Bridge (compat-first)
- Introduce OpenRouter fields/endpoints while preserving existing OpenAI fields for transition compatibility.
- Add migration + read/write bridge logic so old settings do not hard-break.
4. Slice S4: Artist AI Chat Route + Redis Conversation State
- Add `/api/artists/ai-similar/:artistId` with deterministic response envelope and Redis result caching (no conversation state).
5. Slice S5: Frontend Settings/UI Integration
- Add provider enable/model picker/test flows in settings UI and `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
- Keep existing Artwork section behavior intact.
6. Slice S6: Artist Page UX Integration
- Add action trigger on artist page and non-chat recommendations surface (panel/list), regenerate/model label, safe navigation to discovery search.
7. Slice S7: Regression + Full-Stack Verification
- Implement `OR-*` tests; run backend-direct and frontend-proxy probes.
8. Slice S8: Docs + Closeout
- Update `CHANGELOG.md`, `README.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF_COMMITS.md`; capture operator setup instructions.

## Phase 2: Route Surface Integration

### Task 2.1: AI weekly + one-shot similar-artist integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: guarded routes with deterministic fallback (chat route omitted by product decision).

### Task 2.2: Discover route parity integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider-aware discover behavior with contract-safe output.

## Phase 3: Frontend Wiring

### Task 3.1: Settings and controls integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: frontend settings UI + API methods for provider management.

### Task 3.2: AI weekly/artist surfaces integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: frontend one-click similar-artist usage paths wired via `frontend/lib/api.ts` (no chat controls).

## Phase 4: Verification and Hardening

### Task 4.1: Regression/fallback test suite
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: backend route tests covering success + failure contracts.

### Task 4.2: Full-stack verification checkpoint
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: backend-direct and frontend-proxy evidence for shipped endpoints.

## Phase 5: Docs and Operational Closeout

### Task 5.1: Sync docs for shipped behavior
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: `CHANGELOG.md`, `README.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF_COMMITS.md` updates.

companion_files.name: PROMPT_HISTORY.md
companion_files.content:
# PROMPT_HISTORY.md

## 2026-02-14 Session Prompt History (Feature Extraction Bootstrap)
1. This plan was created by extracting remaining Bundle D scope from the archived fjordnode umbrella plan.
2. Scope was narrowed to standalone OpenRouter/provider integration work to reduce cross-bundle coordination overhead.
3. Anti-staleness and regression-aversion guardrails were added at creation time to prevent drift and rework.

## 2026-02-15 Session Prompt History (Reality Check + Replan)
1. User requested a raw comparison of fjord OpenRouter AI recommendations versus this fork and asked to continue with plan review.
2. Agent performed full contract audit of backend/frontend surfaces named in the plan and corrected stale assumptions.
3. Plan was updated to mark Phase 0 complete, capture discover-not-OpenAI reality, add explicit `OR-*` regression IDs, and define concrete execution slices `S1..S8`.
4. User set a hard UX direction: no user-facing chat implementation; AI similar artists must be one-click retrieval of results.

sections.heading: # Plan - OpenRouter AI Recommendation Long-Term Review
sections.content:
## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-15
- Feature: Bundle D extraction from fjordnode umbrella (`AI recommendation stack`)
- Parent context: `.agents/plans/archived/fjordnode-feature-port-umbrella/PLAN.md` (Phase 4 extraction)
- Scope: Planning/design only (no implementation in this document)
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation state: Backlog candidate (not started)

## Why This Was Split Out

The former umbrella contained multiple independent workstreams. Bundle D has cross-cutting API/settings/UI impact and is safer to execute as a standalone track with explicit regression controls.

## Goal

Deliver provider-safe AI recommendation surfaces (OpenRouter + existing fallback paths) without breaking current OpenAI/local behavior or frontend contract stability.

## Staleness and Rework Prevention Protocol (Mandatory)

1. Run a re-context checkpoint at session start and before each atomic task:
- read this plan, `HANDOFF.md`, and `PROMPT_HISTORY.md` in full,
- check `git status` and latest touched files for impacted surfaces.
2. Maintain a living dependency check at each phase boundary:
- verify current settings schema/API fields and route contracts still match planned assumptions,
- update this plan immediately if assumptions drift.
3. Maintain regression-first execution:
- add targeted error-path contract tests for each new/changed endpoint,
- record backend-direct and frontend-proxied probe evidence for externally reachable paths.
4. Prevent stale references:
- run plan-link checks at session start and before handoff,
- update inbound references when files are moved/archived.
5. Prevent quiet rework:
- before coding, record whether each touched surface is `Reuse`, `Adapt`, or `New`,
- after each task, record what was actually changed and why prior behavior remains safe.

## Full-Stack Request Path Baseline

1. Client URL/base path:
- Settings and recommendation UIs via frontend `/api/*` proxies.
2. Frontend proxy behavior:
- all calls must route through `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
3. Backend path candidates:
- `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`
4. Service/config candidates:
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts`
- `backend/src/services/openrouter.ts` (planned)
- `backend/src/config.ts`
5. Downstream dependencies:
- OpenAI/OpenRouter external APIs
- PostgreSQL (`SystemSettings`)
6. Deployment modes to validate:
- `docker-compose.aio.yml`
- `docker-compose.yml`
- local host-run (`docker-compose.local.yml` + host frontend/backend)

## 2026-02-15 Reality Check (De-Stale Snapshot)

1. Current AI/provider state:
- OpenAI settings fields exist in DB/API/UI (`openaiEnabled`, `openaiApiKey`, `openaiModel`, `openaiBaseUrl`).
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts` exists but currently has no call sites; it is not driving active recommendation routes.
- No OpenRouter service/routes/settings surfaces exist yet.
2. Current recommendation/discovery behavior:
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts` is Last.fm/DB/fuzzy-match based (no LLM path).
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts` generation flow is queue + Last.fm/Lidarr pipeline (no OpenAI/OpenRouter dependency).
- There is no `/api/artists/ai-chat/:artistId` endpoint at present.
3. Current frontend state:
- Settings currently expose Artwork services (`AIServicesSection`) for Fanart/Last.fm only.
- System settings hooks/types/API client still reference OpenAI test/settings paths.
- Artist page integration point is `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx` and `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`.
4. Scope impact from this snapshot:
- The migration is additive/new-feature work, not a direct replacement of currently-used OpenAI runtime logic in discover/recommendations.
- Contract risk is highest in settings schema/API compatibility and new artist-chat route behavior.
5. Product direction update (2026-02-15):
- No user-facing conversational chat UI should be introduced for this feature.
- AI similar-artist UX must be one-click retrieval (button -> results list/panel), not chat input/history.

## Spec Outline

1. Add provider abstraction for recommendation/chat workloads.
2. Add OpenRouter service adapter with strict parsing, timeouts, and retries.
3. Extend settings APIs for provider status/model/test controls.
4. Add guarded AI route surfaces (artist chat + AI weekly + discover parity).
5. Wire frontend controls/surfaces through centralized API client.
6. Add fallback/regression coverage and full-stack probes.

## Refined Spec

### Constraints

1. Preserve current route payload shapes for existing consumers.
2. Do not remove existing fallback behavior while introducing new provider.
3. Keep provider selection operator-visible and reversible.
4. Any new settings fields must be backward compatible.
5. Treat provider failures as expected runtime conditions (not exceptional-only paths).
6. No user-facing chat interaction for similar-artist recommendations.

### Acceptance Criteria

1. Provider status/model/test surfaces are operational.
2. One-click similar-artist AI retrieval works with deterministic fallback behavior.
3. Route contracts remain stable under timeout/error conditions.
4. Backend-direct and frontend-base probes succeed for all shipped endpoints.
5. No chat input/history bubble UI is exposed to users for this feature.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Status Legend

- `Pending`: Not started
- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished and includes completion summary

## Phase 0: Re-Context and Contract Freeze

### Task 0.1: Freeze current contracts and fallback semantics
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: baseline route/status/settings contract notes and fallback expectations.
- Completion summary:
  - Re-context complete against live code paths in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`, `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`, `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`, `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`, `backend/src/services/openai.ts`, `frontend/lib/api.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/types.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`, `frontend/app/settings/page.tsx`, and `frontend/features/settings/components/sections/AIServicesSection.tsx`.
  - Confirmed no active AI route for artist chat and no OpenRouter surfaces yet.
  - Confirmed discover generation path is not currently OpenAI-dependent.
  - Verification: static route/client contract inspection only (no runtime command execution required for this freeze step).

### Task 0.2: Define test matrix and failure injections
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: explicit test IDs for timeout, malformed payload, provider-down, and fallback correctness.
- Completion summary:
  - Defined initial regression matrix IDs (to be implemented in Phase 4):
    - `OR-A1`: settings provider status endpoint returns configured/unconfigured contract-safe payload.
    - `OR-A2`: provider test endpoint success path with valid model.
    - `OR-A3`: provider test endpoint timeout/downstream failure maps to stable `{ error }` response.
    - `OR-B1`: artist AI chat returns schema-valid recommendations with model echo.
    - `OR-B2`: artist AI chat malformed provider payload returns deterministic fallback/error envelope.
    - `OR-B3`: artist AI chat provider down/429 path degrades without crashing route.
    - `OR-C1`: discover/weekly parity path remains unchanged when AI provider is disabled.
    - `OR-C2`: provider-enabled path does not regress existing non-AI recommendation routes.
    - `OR-FS1`: frontend `/api/*` proxy calls for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
    - `OR-FS2`: backend-direct endpoint probes for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
  - Verification: matrix documented and mapped to planned phases; implementation pending.

## Reuse/Consolidation Check (2026-02-15)

- Reused patterns:
  - Backend system settings route/test pattern in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`.
  - Frontend API boundary in `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
  - Frontend settings state pattern in `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`.
  - Artist page action-bar insertion pattern in `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx`.
- Duplication intentionally kept:
  - Existing OpenAI settings fields remain during planning; rename/cutover deferred to dedicated migration step to avoid breaking current settings reads.
- Consolidation deferred:
  - Provider abstraction shared across any future LLM consumers (discover/other assistants) will be designed in Phase 1 before adding multiple ad-hoc clients.

## Phase 1: Backend Provider Foundation

### Task 1.1: Provider abstraction contract and adapters
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider interface + OpenAI/OpenRouter adapter wiring.

### Task 1.2: OpenRouter service implementation
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: strict parser, bounded retries/timeouts, normalized error mapping.

### Task 1.3: Settings API surface extension
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider status/model/test endpoints and persisted controls.

## Proposed Execution Slices (Post-Phase-0)

1. Slice S1: Provider Contract Scaffold
- Add provider interface + OpenAI adapter wrap + OpenRouter adapter skeleton in backend service layer.
- No route behavior change yet; compile-only safety.
2. Slice S2: OpenRouter Runtime + Error Normalization
- Implement OpenRouter chat/models/status helpers with strict parsing, timeout, retry bounds, and normalized errors.
3. Slice S3: Settings Schema/API Bridge (compat-first)
- Introduce OpenRouter fields/endpoints while preserving existing OpenAI fields for transition compatibility.
- Add migration + read/write bridge logic so old settings do not hard-break.
4. Slice S4: Artist AI Chat Route + Redis Conversation State
- Add `/api/artists/ai-similar/:artistId` with deterministic response envelope and Redis result caching (no conversation state).
5. Slice S5: Frontend Settings/UI Integration
- Add provider enable/model picker/test flows in settings UI and `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
- Keep existing Artwork section behavior intact.
6. Slice S6: Artist Page UX Integration
- Add action trigger on artist page and non-chat recommendations surface (panel/list), regenerate/model label, safe navigation to discovery search.
7. Slice S7: Regression + Full-Stack Verification
- Implement `OR-*` tests; run backend-direct and frontend-proxy probes.
8. Slice S8: Docs + Closeout
- Update `CHANGELOG.md`, `README.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF_COMMITS.md`; capture operator setup instructions.

## Phase 2: Route Surface Integration

### Task 2.1: AI weekly + one-shot similar-artist integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: guarded routes with deterministic fallback (chat route omitted by product decision).

### Task 2.2: Discover route parity integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: provider-aware discover behavior with contract-safe output.

## Phase 3: Frontend Wiring

### Task 3.1: Settings and controls integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: frontend settings UI + API methods for provider management.

### Task 3.2: AI weekly/artist surfaces integration
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: frontend one-click similar-artist usage paths wired via `frontend/lib/api.ts` (no chat controls).

## Phase 4: Verification and Hardening

### Task 4.1: Regression/fallback test suite
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: backend route tests covering success + failure contracts.

### Task 4.2: Full-stack verification checkpoint
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: backend-direct and frontend-proxy evidence for shipped endpoints.

## Phase 5: Docs and Operational Closeout

### Task 5.1: Sync docs for shipped behavior
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: `CHANGELOG.md`, `README.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF.md`, `docs/FORK_DIFF_COMMITS.md` updates.

sections.heading: ## Document Status
sections.content:
- Last updated: 2026-02-15
- Feature: Bundle D extraction from fjordnode umbrella (`AI recommendation stack`)
- Parent context: `.agents/plans/archived/fjordnode-feature-port-umbrella/PLAN.md` (Phase 4 extraction)
- Scope: Planning/design only (no implementation in this document)
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation state: Backlog candidate (not started)

sections.heading: ## Why This Was Split Out
sections.content: The former umbrella contained multiple independent workstreams. Bundle D has cross-cutting API/settings/UI impact and is safer to execute as a standalone track with explicit regression controls.

sections.heading: ## Goal
sections.content: Deliver provider-safe AI recommendation surfaces (OpenRouter + existing fallback paths) without breaking current OpenAI/local behavior or frontend contract stability.

sections.heading: ## Staleness and Rework Prevention Protocol (Mandatory)
sections.content:
1. Run a re-context checkpoint at session start and before each atomic task:
- read this plan, `HANDOFF.md`, and `PROMPT_HISTORY.md` in full,
- check `git status` and latest touched files for impacted surfaces.
2. Maintain a living dependency check at each phase boundary:
- verify current settings schema/API fields and route contracts still match planned assumptions,
- update this plan immediately if assumptions drift.
3. Maintain regression-first execution:
- add targeted error-path contract tests for each new/changed endpoint,
- record backend-direct and frontend-proxied probe evidence for externally reachable paths.
4. Prevent stale references:
- run plan-link checks at session start and before handoff,
- update inbound references when files are moved/archived.
5. Prevent quiet rework:
- before coding, record whether each touched surface is `Reuse`, `Adapt`, or `New`,
- after each task, record what was actually changed and why prior behavior remains safe.

sections.heading: ## Full-Stack Request Path Baseline
sections.content:
1. Client URL/base path:
- Settings and recommendation UIs via frontend `/api/*` proxies.
2. Frontend proxy behavior:
- all calls must route through `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
3. Backend path candidates:
- `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`
4. Service/config candidates:
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts`
- `backend/src/services/openrouter.ts` (planned)
- `backend/src/config.ts`
5. Downstream dependencies:
- OpenAI/OpenRouter external APIs
- PostgreSQL (`SystemSettings`)
6. Deployment modes to validate:
- `docker-compose.aio.yml`
- `docker-compose.yml`
- local host-run (`docker-compose.local.yml` + host frontend/backend)

sections.heading: ## 2026-02-15 Reality Check (De-Stale Snapshot)
sections.content:
1. Current AI/provider state:
- OpenAI settings fields exist in DB/API/UI (`openaiEnabled`, `openaiApiKey`, `openaiModel`, `openaiBaseUrl`).
- `backend/src/services/openai.ts` exists but currently has no call sites; it is not driving active recommendation routes.
- No OpenRouter service/routes/settings surfaces exist yet.
2. Current recommendation/discovery behavior:
- `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts` is Last.fm/DB/fuzzy-match based (no LLM path).
- `backend/src/routes/discover.ts` generation flow is queue + Last.fm/Lidarr pipeline (no OpenAI/OpenRouter dependency).
- There is no `/api/artists/ai-chat/:artistId` endpoint at present.
3. Current frontend state:
- Settings currently expose Artwork services (`AIServicesSection`) for Fanart/Last.fm only.
- System settings hooks/types/API client still reference OpenAI test/settings paths.
- Artist page integration point is `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx` and `frontend/app/artist/[id]/page.tsx`.
4. Scope impact from this snapshot:
- The migration is additive/new-feature work, not a direct replacement of currently-used OpenAI runtime logic in discover/recommendations.
- Contract risk is highest in settings schema/API compatibility and new artist-chat route behavior.
5. Product direction update (2026-02-15):
- No user-facing conversational chat UI should be introduced for this feature.
- AI similar-artist UX must be one-click retrieval (button -> results list/panel), not chat input/history.

sections.heading: ## Spec Outline
sections.content:
1. Add provider abstraction for recommendation/chat workloads.
2. Add OpenRouter service adapter with strict parsing, timeouts, and retries.
3. Extend settings APIs for provider status/model/test controls.
4. Add guarded AI route surfaces (artist chat + AI weekly + discover parity).
5. Wire frontend controls/surfaces through centralized API client.
6. Add fallback/regression coverage and full-stack probes.

sections.heading: ## Refined Spec
sections.content:
### Constraints

1. Preserve current route payload shapes for existing consumers.
2. Do not remove existing fallback behavior while introducing new provider.
3. Keep provider selection operator-visible and reversible.
4. Any new settings fields must be backward compatible.
5. Treat provider failures as expected runtime conditions (not exceptional-only paths).
6. No user-facing chat interaction for similar-artist recommendations.

### Acceptance Criteria

1. Provider status/model/test surfaces are operational.
2. One-click similar-artist AI retrieval works with deterministic fallback behavior.
3. Route contracts remain stable under timeout/error conditions.
4. Backend-direct and frontend-base probes succeed for all shipped endpoints.
5. No chat input/history bubble UI is exposed to users for this feature.

6. No user-facing chat interaction for similar-artist recommendations.

1. Provider status/model/test surfaces are operational.
2. One-click similar-artist AI retrieval works with deterministic fallback behavior.
3. Route contracts remain stable under timeout/error conditions.
4. Backend-direct and frontend-base probes succeed for all shipped endpoints.
5. No chat input/history bubble UI is exposed to users for this feature.

- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished and includes completion summary

- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished and includes completion summary

sections.heading: ## Phase 0: Re-Context and Contract Freeze
sections.content:
### Task 0.1: Freeze current contracts and fallback semantics
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: baseline route/status/settings contract notes and fallback expectations.
- Completion summary:
  - Re-context complete against live code paths in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`, `backend/src/routes/recommendations.ts`, `backend/src/routes/discover.ts`, `backend/src/routes/artists.ts`, `backend/src/services/openai.ts`, `frontend/lib/api.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/types.ts`, `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`, `frontend/app/settings/page.tsx`, and `frontend/features/settings/components/sections/AIServicesSection.tsx`.
  - Confirmed no active AI route for artist chat and no OpenRouter surfaces yet.
  - Confirmed discover generation path is not currently OpenAI-dependent.
  - Verification: static route/client contract inspection only (no runtime command execution required for this freeze step).

### Task 0.2: Define test matrix and failure injections
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: explicit test IDs for timeout, malformed payload, provider-down, and fallback correctness.
- Completion summary:
  - Defined initial regression matrix IDs (to be implemented in Phase 4):
    - `OR-A1`: settings provider status endpoint returns configured/unconfigured contract-safe payload.
    - `OR-A2`: provider test endpoint success path with valid model.
    - `OR-A3`: provider test endpoint timeout/downstream failure maps to stable `{ error }` response.
    - `OR-B1`: artist AI chat returns schema-valid recommendations with model echo.
    - `OR-B2`: artist AI chat malformed provider payload returns deterministic fallback/error envelope.
    - `OR-B3`: artist AI chat provider down/429 path degrades without crashing route.
    - `OR-C1`: discover/weekly parity path remains unchanged when AI provider is disabled.
    - `OR-C2`: provider-enabled path does not regress existing non-AI recommendation routes.
    - `OR-FS1`: frontend `/api/*` proxy calls for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
    - `OR-FS2`: backend-direct endpoint probes for new provider endpoints resolve correctly.
  - Verification: matrix documented and mapped to planned phases; implementation pending.

sections.heading: ## Reuse/Consolidation Check (2026-02-15)
sections.content:
- Reused patterns:
  - Backend system settings route/test pattern in `backend/src/routes/systemSettings.ts`.
  - Frontend API boundary in `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
  - Frontend settings state pattern in `frontend/features/settings/hooks/useSystemSettings.ts`.
  - Artist page action-bar insertion pattern in `frontend/features/artist/components/ArtistActionBar.tsx`.
- Duplication intentionally kept:
  - Existing OpenAI settings fields remain during planning; rename/cutover deferred to dedicated migration step to avoid breaking current settings reads.
- Consolidation deferred:
  - Provider abstraction shared across any future LLM consumers (discover/other assistants) will be designed in Phase 1 before adding multiple ad-hoc clients.
